title: Complexity MoE + PID Dynamics (Token-Routed I64)
author: Complexity-ML

data.description: 4-expert mixture-of-experts MLP with deterministic token routing via token_id % 4 and mask-multiply implementation for compile compatibility.
Learnable equilibrium mu traverses all 9 layers with tight clamping for stability, acting like a PID-style controller over hidden state dynamics.
Replaces relu² activation with SwiGLU in the expert MLPs.

novel_contributions: Token-routed MoE with deterministic routing using token_id % 4
PID dynamics with mu traversing all 9 layers
Mask-multiply routing designed to be fullgraph-safe for torch.compile
